_meta.subject: bib: normalize author name Taxwise -> Krzywoszyja
_meta.notes: Earliest 04-24 snapshot. Pre-Paper-7-retirement. Paper 9 still skeleton (🟡 278). Paper 7 LOC=`✅ fleshed` -> human reads as blooming (drafted, OTS-only); parser misreads -> sealed (loc=0 from text). Paper 2 has `no user-study` per Repro -> human says benchmark-todo present -> blooming; parser pattern-misses 'RTX ✓' (vs 'RTX bench') and treats benchmark=0 -> full. These two are the legitimate parser-vs-human disagreements for this snapshot.
expected_disagreements: snn: parser=full, human=blooming (parser misses 'RTX ✓' shorthand vs 'RTX bench' canonical)
p2-1-ik: parser=sealed, human=blooming (parser fails to extract LOC from '✅ fleshed' free-text)
